page: Microsoft Azure D96als_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the Dalv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture and features 96 dedicated vCPUs. The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include any bundled local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes. It is, however, designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external disks. There are no graphics processing units included in this configuration, and it does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Due to its low-memory configuration relative to the high vCPU count, the D96als_v6 offers a cost-effective option for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. This resource profile is suitable for tasks such as batch processing, compute-intensive web serving, distributed analytics, and certain scientific modeling workloads where CPU scaling is prioritized over RAM capacity.
description: Microsoft Azure D96als_v6 is a compute-aligned virtual machine from the Dalv6 family, featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs on an AMD x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per vCPU ratio that positions it as a low-memory, compute-heavy option. The instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and does not include local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable for external disk attachments. With zero GPUs and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this server is designed for workloads requiring high CPU density without the added cost of excess memory or local storage. It is well-suited for batch processing, compute-intensive web serving, and distributed analytics.

tagline: A high-vCPU, low-memory virtual machine designed for compute-heavy workloads requiring dedicated AMD processing power without bundled local storage.
